## [00:00 - 03:00]

In this lesson, I'm going to teach you how to use a Shopify app called Shipit to automate all your orders in Shopify Store. Shipit is basically a shipping solution software that integrates with all the carriers that you're already working with with your Shopify Store so that you can create consignment and manifest it within your Shopify Store. At the moment, you're probably doing this way. You receive an order and you go to your delivery partner websites or software and generate consignment order from the software and create the consignment and manifest it through there. With this app, you don't need to do that anymore. With one click, two clicks away, you can actually generate consignment straight from your Shopify Store so you can actually save a lot of your time. Now I'm going to turn it over to my laptop and let's dive in. Before we begin, we want to make sure that the app has the following three features. One is to automate the order fulfillment and delivery process. Second is you are able to choose different carriers depending on the rates.
